name: Hot Jalapeno Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp or less chopped jalapeño peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your oven to the temperature specified on the bread machine's settings.
2. In a large bowl, combine the yeast, sugar, and 1 cup of unbleached flour with enough water to form a soft dough.
3. Add salt, remaining flour, and chopped jalapeño peppers to the dough.
4. Pour into the bread pan that came with your bread machine.
5. Select the white bread cycle on your bread machine and start the kneading process.
6. Let the bread rise until it doubles in size, then bake according to your bread machine's instructions.
7. Allow the bread to cool before slicing. Enjoy with cheese and cucumber sandwiches or alongside roast beef and chicken dishes.
